name: Glazed Strawberry Yogurt Squares
recipeInstructions:
Makes 16 squares
3 "Fruit Corners" strawberry fruit snacks
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Mix Bisquick, 1/4 cup sugar and the butter with a fork until crumbly. Set aside the crumble mixture.
Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 8 x 8 x 2 inch pan.
Bake for 10 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Mix together 1/4 cup sugar and the remaining ingredients except fruit roll-ups; pour over baked layer.
Cover completely with opened Fruit Corners (strawberry) cut to fit if necessary. Sprinkle with reserved crumble mixture.
Return to oven; bake for about 20 minutes longer, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Cool for 15 minutes before cutting into squares.
